requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — Domestic Type C/D/E/F Context and IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——国内Type C/D/E/F环境与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互通——國內Type C/D/E/F情境與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2

summary.en: Chad projects that specify IEC-aligned EV charging should configure AC equipment for IEC 62196-2 Type 2 and DC for IEC 62196-3 CCS2. Domestic household plugs (Type C/D/E/F) are not EV charging couplers and should not be treated as replacement pathways for EV supply equipment. In a low-scale Chad market, connector requirements are usually defined by the project owner, vehicle fleet compatibility, and tender scope rather than by public consumer standardization.
summary.zh: 在乍得项目若指定IEC体系的电动汽车充电，交流端应按IEC 62196-2 Type 2配置，直流端按IEC 62196-3 CCS2配置。国内家用插头Type C/D/E/F并非EV充电耦合器，不应作为替代接口方案。乍得项目规模较小，接口要求通常由项目业主、车辆车型兼容性和招标范围定义，而非消费市场的统一接口生态。
summary.zht: 在乍得項目若指定IEC體系的電動汽車充電，交流端應按IEC 62196-2 Type 2配置，直流端按IEC 62196-3 CCS2配置。國內家用插頭Type C/D/E/F並非EV充電耦合器，不應作為替代接口方案。乍得項目規模較小，介面要求通常由項目業主、車輛型號兼容性和招標範圍定義。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1 — EV conductive charging system general requirements
IEC 61851-23 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment

summary.en: China domestic AC chargers commonly use GB/T 20234.2 and DC chargers use GB/T 20234.3 and GB/T 27930 communication. These are useful for Chinese domestic engineering but are not plug-compatible with IEC Type 2 / CCS2 equipment.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩通常使用GB/T 20234.2，直流快充使用GB/T 20234.3和GB/T 27930通信。该体系对中国境内工程有效，但与IEC Type 2 / CCS2接口不兼容。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁通常使用GB/T 20234.2，直流快充使用GB/T 20234.3和GB/T 27930通信。該體系對中國境內工程有效，但與IEC Type 2 / CCS2介面不兼容。

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger cannot be deployed as-is for Type 2 / CCS2 environments. Hardware changes are needed across coupler, cable, signaling, and commissioning documents. Confirm required connector architecture against the specific Chad vehicle or fleet specification before manufacturing.
gap.zh: 单纯GB/T接口设计的充电桩不能直接用于Type 2/CCS2场景。耦合器、电缆、信号链路和验收文件均需改造。生产前应按乍得具体车型或车队规格确认接口体系。
gap.zht: 單純GB/T介面設計的充電樁不能直接用於Type 2/CCS2場景。耦合器、電纜、訊號鏈路與驗收文件均需改造。生產前應依乍得具體車型或車隊規格確認介面體系。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where project documentation or operator requirement specifies IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2; GB/T-only hardware is not compatible
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 only applies to China domestic charging designs

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T charging interfaces are not sufficient for Chad IEC-direction projects that require Type 2 / CCS2. Confirm project fleet and tender requirements before finalizing connector design.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T充电接口不能满足乍得IEC方向项目中Type 2 / CCS2的要求。请在定型前确认项目车队及招标接口要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T充電介面不能滿足乍得IEC方向項目中Type 2 / CCS2的要求。請在定型前確認項目車隊及招標介面要求。
